subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter dated the fifth of Sha'bán of the year [13]37 was received. Its contents were pleasing, for they served as evidence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه پنجم شعبان سنه ۳۷ وصول یافت مضامین دلنشین بود زیرا دلیل
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @Letters of the Living, @laws of marriage and dowry
